title: Homalobus debilis
taxonomy: Homalobus debilis is a species within the family Loranthaceae. This family is commonly known as mistletoe and is a group of hemiparasitic plants. They are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The Loranthaceae family is further divided into various genera, with Homalobus debilis belonging to one of them. The classification of Homalobus debilis helps in understanding its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
